rationale: The cited paper appears to be a plausible foundational prior in the exact domain the citing paper positions against: dynamic earned/social WOM effects on sales (Kiva daily media-to-sales system) versus the citing paper’s prerelease WOM dynamics and revenue prediction. The citing note explicitly says prior work emphasized aggregate WOM and lagged WOM-sales effects, and this 2012 JMR study is a well-aligned example of that stream rather than an obviously incidental mention. With this topical and conceptual overlap, it should be retained for full relation judgment.
